hero.title: Create Your Creative QR Codes

otherFormats.title: Download & print
otherFormats.vectorNoSize: Vector exports are plain black-and-white QR codes without beautify styles or overlay text. Size cannot be changed.
otherFormats.svgHint: Tip: SVG is vector-based—great for lossless scaling and editing in Illustrator, Figma, and similar tools.

features.title: Our Features
features.heading: Go Beyond the Basics
features.desc: QuickQR offers a suite of powerful tools to make your QR codes more effective, engaging, and aligned with your brand. From design customization to performance tracking, we have you covered.

dynamic.title: Dynamic QR Codes
dynamic.desc: Update the destination URL anytime without changing the QR code.

branding.title: Custom Branding
branding.desc: Incorporate your logo and brand colors for a professional look.

vector.title: Vector Formats
vector.desc: Download in SVG for high-quality printing at any scale.

analytics.title: Scan Analytics
analytics.desc: Track performance with detailed scan statistics.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Find answers to common questions about our QR code generator.
faq.q1: What types of content can I encode in a QR code?
faq.a1: You can encode URLs, text, email addresses, phone numbers, Wi-Fi network details, and more. Our generator primarily focuses on URLs for simplicity, but advanced options are available.
faq.q2: Are the generated QR codes free to use?
faq.a2: Yes, the basic QR codes you generate are completely free for both personal and commercial use and will never expire. Advanced features like analytics and dynamic codes may require a subscription.
faq.q3: Can I customize the design of my QR code?
faq.a3: Absolutely! You can change the colors, add a logo to the center, and modify the shape of the QR code elements to match your branding using our "Beautify" tool.
faq.q4: In what formats can I download the QR code?
faq.a4: You can download your QR codes in high-resolution PNG and SVG formats, making them suitable for both web and print applications.
